prompt: I need tests for the MessageParser. Design artifact is at evals/files/message-parser-design.yaml. Use Java with JUnit 5.
assertions: Output includes a coverage matrix mapping design elements to test cases
Every sequential behavior step's on_failure path has a dedicated test (invalid_sync, unsupported_version, length_mismatch, checksum_failed, unknown_type)
Every error_handling entry (null/empty raw_data, too-short raw_data) has a dedicated test
Boundary values tested for raw_data length (4 bytes minimum, 1024 bytes maximum, 3 bytes too short, 1025 bytes too long)
Union return type handled: tests assert on specific Success or Error variant fields, not just non-null
No test uses only 'assertDoesNotThrow' or 'assertNotNull' as its sole assertion
Test names describe the scenario being tested, not just the method name
Happy path test: valid message parsed correctly with verified payload fields
